articles.content: The efficiency doesnt end on the production line either. Even the gigantic cafeteria operates on the same principle, with workers moving in a very organized flow. Until we accidentally disrupted it, … [+2178 chars]

articles.title: iOS 26.4.2: Apple Emergency iPhone Update Fixes Deleted Notification Bug - Forbes
articles.description: Apple has released a new iPhone update — that has taken many by surprise — to address a vulnerability that was recently exploited by the FBI.
